articles.title: The problem with nostalgic AI images of old Singapore
articles.description: AI nostalgia slop of Singapore causes a “double loss” of these places: first, to time and progress, and now, to a cultural flattening. It also suggests that history must fit a specific aesthetic to be worth remembering. Read more at straitstimes.com.
articles.content: Doomscrolling on Instagram recently, I came across what looked like a photograph of the former Jurong Entertainment Centre (JEC). The image appeared hyper-realistic – its distinctive facade, with its blue-grey palette and Shaw Brothers “SB” signage, ... [7657 chars]

articles.title: Trailblazers and Innovations: From Wally Funk's Legacy to China's Rockets
articles.description: Wally Funk, pioneering aviator and former astronaut trainee, has died at 87. Also, China tested a sea-based rocket booster recovery system, challenging U.S. dominance in reusable rockets. Meanwhile, SpaceX's immediate value is anchored on Earth, benefiting from the AI boom in infrastructure, particularly data centers.
articles.content: Pioneering aviator and astronaut trainee Wally Funk, who made history as the oldest person to fly to space, has passed away in Texas at the age of 87. Known for her groundbreaking achievements in aviation, Funk's death was announced by the city of Gr... [622 chars]

articles.title: Meta scales back AI tool after backlash
articles.description: Meta has pulled the plug on a feature of a recently launched AI tool following criticism that it made Instagram accounts fodder for use in creating AI-generated images.
articles.content:
Meta has pulled the plug on a feature of a recently launched AI tool following criticism that it made Instagram accounts fodder for use in creating AI-generated images.

articles.title: Meta Removes Default AI Integration On Instagram
articles.description: Designed to feed its new ‘Muse Image’ tool, Meta opted in users' their posts used for training material without permission
articles.content: This week, Meta introduced “Muse Image,” a new tool suite for Instagram and WhatsApp. Currently available stateside, what stirred controversy was how it was integrated, automatically using other posts unless opting out manually. Backlash to any AI an... [1863 chars]

articles.title: Phoebe Gates' AI Shopping App Phia Reportedly Claimed Unearned Affiliate Sales Through Fake Clicks
articles.description: Gates, who is Bill Gates’ daughter, founded the app alongside Sophia Kianni.
articles.content: According to multiple reports, the AI-powered shopping plugin Phia used a tactic known as cookie stuffing to attach its affiliate code to sales it didn't actually drive. Phia, which launched last spring, was co-founded by Phoebe Gates — Bill Gates' d... [1004 chars]

articles.title: What Smart People Are Saying About Apple's Lawsuit Against OpenAI
articles.description: Apple sued OpenAI on Friday, accusing the AI startup of orchestrating a campaign to steal trade secrets from iPhone maker.
articles.content:
The AI talent war may now be worthy of a Hollywood adaptation.
In a new lawsuit that reads like a corporate crime thriller, Apple accused OpenAI of poaching former Apple employees, conducting "show and tell" interviews, and accessing confidential doc... [8024 chars]

articles.title: Meta's AI Detector Can't Detect Images It Generated Itself, Report Finds
articles.description: Once the images were cropped, the detection tool began to struggle, according to Reuters.
articles.content:
Meta’s new AI detection tool isn’t working entirely as advertised, according to a new report.
Meta debuted its first image generation model, Muse Image, earlier this week. As part of the debut, the tech giant also announced that all images generated ... [3001 chars]
